_comment: htb-cms-cve-pack: hand-curated CVEs for Pterodactyl Panel + Wings. Bypasses NVD CPE-string ambiguity (vendor 'pterodactyl' / product 'panel' is sparsely populated in NVD). Sourced from upstream GHSA + the htb/pterodactyl pre-fight briefing. Match policy: prefer false positives over false negatives.

entries.summary: Pterodactyl Panel allows account takeover via crafted password-reset flow when the email address can be controlled.
Pterodactyl Panel locale handling allows an unauthenticated attacker to read arbitrary files on the host (locale parameter directory traversal in the i18n loader).
GHSA-4r78-3w7p-c83p: Pterodactyl Panel password-reset flaw permitting account takeover (duplicate of CVE-2024-43791 for cases where only the GHSA id is published).
GHSA-r394-9wq2-pf3v: Pterodactyl Panel locale-parameter LFI (duplicate of CVE-2025-49132 for cases where only the GHSA id is published).
